scripts.build:prod: ng build --output-path=../backend/src/main/resources/static && ([ -d ../backend/src/main/resources/static/browser ] && cp -r ../backend/src/main/resources/static/browser/. ../backend/src/main/resources/static/ && rm -rf ../backend/src/main/resources/static/browser || true) && rm -f ../backend/src/main/resources/static/prerendered-routes.json
